calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judith Baer, former attorney for petitioner, Dennis Livingston, attotney for petitioner, Chritopher Jew, attorney for L. Sanchez.
Ms Sanchez has not signed consent form, but is going to do so in the next few days. Court inquired about the payment of cost to attorney's. Ms Baer stated that her cost has been paid. Mr. Livingston states the his cost was added to the proposed order. Court informed him that he is to file a declaration regarding his cost with the court. Order to be redone and the reviewed at by the court. Matter take under submission.
COMMISSIONER: DOROTHY MCMATH, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CSR11722, CLERK: LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:F. SMITH

Petition Of Judith Lauter Baer For Statutory And Extraordinary Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Livingston appearing for administrator Benjamin Santana. Judith Baer appearing as former attorney for Mr. Santana. Christopher Jew appearing for and with Lillian Sanchez, beneficiary. In the inventory question, Mr. Livingston has prepared a declaration for Mr. Santana but he have not been able to contact Mr. Santana for the last couple of weeks. Mr. Livingston has been on vacation. The beneficiary did not object to the reimbursement request. On Ms. Baer's petition for attorney's fees, Mr. Livingston has not seen Ms. Baer's timesheet. He is entitled to see her timesheet. Court will leave it with both counsel to work out the allocation. If no agreement on the allocation is reached, both counsel will need to file their timesheets. Ms. Baer raised the confidentially issue with filing her timesheet. If it comes to that, Ms. Baer can line it out. Both petitions are continued to 7/30.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.

Petition Of Judith Lauter Baer For Statutory And Extraordinary Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
